name: Precision Data — Gantt Chart with Exact ISO Dates
input: Create a Gantt chart for our Phase II clinical trial. Use these exact dates: Protocol Design 2025-01-15 to 2025-03-30, IRB Submission 2025-04-01 to 2025-05-15, Site Activation 2025-05-20 to 2025-07-31, Patient Enrollment 2025-08-01 to 2026-02-28, Treatment Phase 2025-09-15 to 2026-06-30, Data Collection 2025-10-01 to 2026-08-15, Statistical Analysis 2026-08-20 to 2026-11-30, Manuscript Preparation 2026-12-01 to 2027-03-31. Milestone: DSMB Review on 2026-01-15. Milestone: Interim Analysis on 2026-04-15.
qualityCriteria: Protocol Design task with 2025-01-15 start date
IRB Submission task present with correct date range
All 8 tasks and 2 milestones present (10 items total)
